ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the country's flag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the income level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the income level's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_data" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the country in the given year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "indicator_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hierarchical_clustering" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "cluster_label" INTEGER /* Hierarchical clustering label for the country */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Clustering algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the clustering algorithm */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the clustering data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
